calendar.matters:
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Denied

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Denied

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-05-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Tito Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Collegiate Housing Services, Inc.
Gadi Rwayitare, Director of Housing for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Brianna Burns.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 19, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Collegiate Housing Services, Inc., and against defendant Brianna Burns as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $2,907.00.
Holdover Damages - $162.00.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $255.00.

Total - $3,324.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Collegiate Housing Services, Inc. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 100 Font Boulevard, #7-b, San Francisco, CA 94132-2525. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-05-2010 Assigned To Trial Court
